form.formComment: Last start 10th (Fr4) over 1609m at this track, well beaten by Captain Groove (1:53.50) in NR up to 63 on April 2 at $3.70. Before that, 8th (Fr3) over 2030m at this track was 9th-14.9 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Sweet Rocky (2:29.00) in NR up to 58 on March 28 at $5. May improve aided by the ace draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke stride as the field negotiated the final turn.
Raced roughly during the score up and broke gait as the start was effected.
Checked between the 600m and 400m behind the weakening Shades Of Heaven.
Hampered after the start when avoiding the galloping Goodtime Bravo.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 5th-8.6 beaten 13 m by Petes Crunch Time (1:53.70) in NR up to 65 on March 28 at $19. Before that 6th (Fr4) over 2030m at this track, at the bell was 4th-6.5 beaten 9 m by Illawong Danny (2:26.90) in NR 59 to 63 on March 19 at $6.50. Prefer others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running over the concluding stages and not fully tested.
Worked forward to the lead passing the 1600m.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 200m improved to the inside of Angus Finn.
Inconvenienced approaching the 400m when Soho Washington galloped.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr5) over 2030m at this track, beaten 10 m by Kanena Provlima (2:25.40) in NR up to 80 on April 2 at $19. At his previous start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr9) over 1609m at Menangle, at the bell was 9th-17.99 beaten 7 m by Surf Ace (1:52.70) in NR up to 68 on March 24 at $3.30. Can play a role again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had difficulty securing clear running until passing the 150m.
Pulled hard during the early and middle stages.
Checked shortly after the start was affected.

form.formComment: Beaten favourite last start when second at Tamworth on March 26. Scored the start prior at Tamworth on March 12. Go well again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Beaten favourite last start when second at Tamworth on March 26. Scored the start prior at Tamworth on March 12. Go well again.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he solid effort when 3rd (Fr5) over 2360m after showing early speed at Tamworth was 5th-12.34 at the bell, beaten 12 m by Helluva (2:50.20) in No NR on January 23 at $34. Big chance while fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Worked forward to the lead approaching the 1100m.
Out of position as the start was affected.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign when a close third after showing early speed, behind Saint Crusader at this track over 1609m in a No NR on January 28 at $10. Market watch fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign when a close third after showing early speed, behind Saint Crusader at this track over 1609m in a No NR on January 28 at $10. Market watch fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 1.4 m second behind Surfers Delight at Penrith over 1720m NR up to 90 last start. Before that was beaten 4 metres fourth at Menangle over 1609m in 4-020yo+ 0W/20K Stakes on March 27. Racing well and is expected to play a major role.

Had a tendency to over race during the early and middle stages of the event.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third behind American Hammer at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 80 on March 19 at $4.60. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3 m finishing second behind Jalaneel at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 90 on March 28 at $21. Close to another win.
